name: saoshu
description: Local-first Chinese web novel scanning toolkit.

scripts.check: npm run check:skills && npm run check:docs && npm run check:boundaries && npm run check:encoding && npm run check:helpers && npm run check:rules && npm run check:sampling-templates && npm run check:sampling-report-focus && npm run check:chapter-detect-assist && npm run check:chapter-full-fallback && npm run check:full-book-segment-scan && npm run check:keyword-loop && npm run check:alias-loop && npm run check:risk-question-loop && npm run check:relation-loop && npm run check:feedback-assets && npm run check:db-compare-feedback && npm run check:db-mode-diff && npm run check:report-compare-feedback && npm run check:mode-diff-ledger && npm run check:mode-diff-workflow && npm run check:mode-diff-queue && npm run check:mode-diff-discover && npm run check:report-views && npm run check:report-priority && npm run check:report-summary-focus && npm run check:merge-focus && npm run check:event-review-focus && npm run check:terms && npm run check:cmd-templates && npm run check:wizard && npm run check:release-meta && npm run check:cli && npm run check:e2e && npm run check:schema
scripts.check:skills: node packages/saoshu-harem-review/scripts/quick_validate.mjs packages/saoshu-harem-review && node packages/saoshu-harem-review/scripts/quick_validate.mjs packages/saoshu-term-wiki && node packages/saoshu-harem-review/scripts/quick_validate.mjs packages/saoshu-scan-db && node packages/saoshu-harem-review/scripts/quick_validate.mjs packages/saoshu-orchestrator && node packages/saoshu-harem-review/scripts/quick_validate.mjs packages/saoshu-mcp-enricher-adapter
